---
title: "Joseph Mason"
---

## Joseph Mason

**Dates:** (1799-1863)

### Description

agrarian agitator

### Biography

He was the brother of CMY’s nurse Maria (Mason) Reeves (if the identification of Maria Mason with Mrs Reeves is correct). Coleridge, <i>Life</i>, 80-1; <i>John Keble’s Parishes</i>, 96-7; Charlotte M. Yonge, <i>An Old Woman’s Outlook in a Hampshire Village</i>(London: Macmillan: 1892), 65-7; <i>Joseph Mason: Assigned Convict 1831-1837</i> ed. David Kent and Norma Townsend (Melbourne: Melbourne University Press 1996), 3.

### Letters

- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
